activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with the keyword «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: There was a post office here, but it closed years ago.

evaluator.answer: There used to be a post office here, but it closed years ago

activities.explanation: La existencia anterior se transforma en «There used to be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with the keyword «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: I cycled to school in the past, but now I take the bus.

evaluator.answer: I used to cycle to school, but now I take the bus

activities.explanation: El antiguo hábito se expresa con «used to cycle».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the question with «USE TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: Did you walk to school regularly in the past?

evaluator.answer: Did you use to walk to school

activities.explanation: Después de «did» corresponde «use to + infinitivo».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «DIDN'T USE TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: In the past, I did not like olives.

evaluator.answer: I didn't use to like olives

activities.explanation: La negativa de un antiguo estado usa «didn't use to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the repeated-action meaning.
activities.prompt: When we were children, we played outside until dark every evening.

evaluator.answer: When we were children, we would play outside until dark every evening

activities.explanation: El marco ya está dado y la acción repetida usa «would play».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: My uncle owned an old sailing boat in the past.

evaluator.answer: My uncle used to have an old sailing boat

activities.explanation: La posesión anterior se expresa con «used to have».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the repeated-action meaning.
activities.prompt: Whenever we stayed with our grandparents, we helped in the garden after breakfast.

evaluator.answer: Whenever we stayed with our grandparents, we would help in the garden after breakfast

activities.explanation: El marco repetido permite «would help».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: I visited the market every Saturday in the past, but I shop online now.

evaluator.answer: I used to visit the market every Saturday, but I shop online now

activities.explanation: El contraste con el presente se expresa con «used to visit» y se conserva en la segunda cláusula.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the repeated-action meaning.
activities.prompt: While I was abroad, I called my parents every Sunday.

evaluator.answer: While I was abroad, I would call my parents every Sunday

activities.explanation: El periodo está establecido y la llamada era una acción repetida.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: Before changing jobs, I got up at five every morning.

evaluator.answer: Before changing jobs, I used to get up at five every morning

activities.explanation: La rutina anterior usa «used to get up».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «AM USED TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: Getting up before six is normal for me now.

evaluator.answer: I am used to getting up before six

activities.explanation: Estar acostumbrado se expresa con «be used to + -ing».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «GOT USED TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: The traffic became normal for me after a few weeks.

evaluator.answer: I got used to the traffic after a few weeks

activities.explanation: La adaptación se expresa con «got used to + nombre».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the repeated-action meaning.
activities.prompt: Whenever we stayed with her, my grandmother told us a story before bed.

evaluator.answer: Whenever we stayed with her, my grandmother would tell us a story before bed

activities.explanation: La acción repetida dentro del marco usa «would tell».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the past-state meaning.
activities.prompt: My grandmother knew dozens of traditional songs in those days.

evaluator.answer: My grandmother used to know dozens of traditional songs in those days

activities.explanation: El conocimiento era un estado y se transforma con «used to know».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULDN'T» to express persistent failure.
activities.prompt: The old printer repeatedly failed to start.

evaluator.answer: The old printer wouldn't start

activities.explanation: «Wouldn't start» presenta el fallo persistente de la máquina.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the current habit with «USUALLY» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: I cycle to work on most days.

evaluator.answer: I usually cycle to work

activities.explanation: Un hábito actual usa present simple con «usually».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: A bookshop existed on this corner before the redevelopment.

evaluator.answer: There used to be a bookshop on this corner before the redevelopment

activities.explanation: La existencia anterior usa «There used to be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the repeated-event meaning.
activities.prompt: On cold mornings, the old engine sounded rough for the first minute.

evaluator.answer: On cold mornings, the old engine would sound rough for the first minute

activities.explanation: El marco repetido permite «would sound» con significado dinámico.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «WOULD» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: When I was a child, I visited my aunt every Friday.

evaluator.answer: When I was a child, I would visit my aunt every Friday

activities.explanation: El marco está explícito y la visita era repetida.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the question with «USE TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: Was this area quieter in the past?

evaluator.answer: Did this area use to be quieter

activities.explanation: La pregunta sobre un estado anterior usa «Did ... use to be?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «DIDN'T USE TO» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: I was not afraid of dogs when I was younger.

evaluator.answer: I didn't use to be afraid of dogs when I was younger

activities.explanation: El estado negativo anterior usa «didn't use to be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «USED» without changing the meaning.
activities.prompt: We regularly walked along the harbour after dinner before moving inland.

evaluator.answer: We used to walk along the harbour after dinner before moving inland

activities.explanation: «Used to walk» expresa el hábito abandonado.

activities.instructions: Rewrite both repeated actions with «WOULD».
activities.prompt: On Sundays at our grandparents' house, Dad cooked and we washed up afterwards.

evaluator.answer: On Sundays at our grandparents' house, Dad would cook and we would wash up afterwards

activities.explanation: Ambas acciones repetidas usan «would + infinitivo».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the state with «USED TO» and the repeated action with «WOULD».
activities.prompt: When Lena lived in the village, she knew everyone and called at each door before the festival.

evaluator.answer: When Lena lived in the village, she used to know everyone and would call at each door before the festival

activities.explanation: El estado usa «used to know» y la acción repetida «would call».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the former habit with «USED TO» and the adaptation with «GOT USED TO».
activities.prompt: I relied on paper maps before, but after a month using the navigation app became normal.

evaluator.answer: I used to rely on paper maps, but after a month I got used to using the navigation app

activities.explanation: El hábito anterior y la adaptación requieren estructuras diferentes.
